startups.name: Darwinbox
startups.shortDesc: Enterprise HR software processing 500M+ data points with Agentic AI.
startups.description: Darwinbox is a cloud-based human resource management software provider based in Hyderabad. Reaching Unicorn status, it raised over $307M and its new Agentic AI platform is revolutionizing enterprise workflows.
startups.founder: Chaitanya Peddi, Jayant Paleti, Rohit Chennamaneni

startups.name: Skyroot Aerospace
startups.shortDesc: Leading India's private space tech. Launched Vikram-S.
startups.description: Founded by former ISRO scientists, Skyroot launched India's first private rocket. Ranked #1 in LinkedIn's Top Startups Hyderabad 2025, they recently raised ₹100 crore from BlackRock.
startups.founder: Pawan Kumar Chandana, Naga Bharath Daka

startups.name: Zenoti
startups.shortDesc: All-in-one software for salons and spas.
startups.description: Zenoti is a SaaS Unicorn ($1.5B+ valuation) providing cloud-based software for spas, salons, and medspas to manage all aspects of their business globally.

startups.name: HighRadius
startups.shortDesc: Fintech software for autonomous accounts receivable.
startups.description: HighRadius is a Fintech Unicorn offering AI-driven order-to-cash and treasury management software designed to automate complex financial processes.

startups.name: Recykal
startups.shortDesc: Digital platforms mapping India's waste management.
startups.description: A prominent CleanTech/UrbanTech startup recognized as a top LinkedIn startup for driving circular economy solutions in India.

startups.name: BrightChamps
startups.description: BrightChamps is a highly-valued EdTech soonicorn valued at ~$650M that teaches kids essential tech skills like coding, financial literacy, and AI.

startups.name: Credgenics
startups.shortDesc: Fintech AI for digitizing loan collections.
startups.description: A leading AI-powered debt resolution and legal automation platform. Valued around $340M as a fast-emerging soonicorn out of the Hyderabad financial ecosystem.
